name: Jodi No. 1
overview:
Jodi No. 1 is a Nepali web series where chaos arrives early when Aman, an aspiring actor, prepares for a make-or-break audition while his wife Dia struggles to keep their finances—and sanity—intact. Upstairs, Sapana and Gaurab navigate the quiet tensions of their arranged marriage, where unspoken regrets and a simple request to travel stir unexpected conflict.

As Aman’s artistic ambitions clash with Dia’s corporate pragmatism, and Sapana challenges Gaurab’s traditional views on gender and responsibility, this house becomes a stage for love, frustration, and the messy reality of modern relationships in Kathmandu.
